MOKOUMOD-BURN_POWER.description: At the start of the owner's turn, lose X HP and [blue]1/5[/blue] of their [gold]Burn[/gold] (round up).
MOKOUMOD-BURN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of the turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP and [blue]1/5[/blue] of [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-BURN_POWER.title: Burn
MOKOUMOD-REKINDLE_POWER.description: When you would die, instead: heal to [blue]15%[/blue] of your Max HP, lose all [gold]Burn[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-REKINDLE_POWER.smartDescription: When you would die, instead: heal to [blue]{HealPercent}%[/blue] of your Max HP, lose all [gold]Burn[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rekindle[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-REKINDLE_POWER.title: Rekindle
MOKOUMOD-FUJIYAMA_VOLCANO_POWER.title: Fujiyama Volcano
MOKOUMOD-XU_FUS_DIMENSION_POWER.smartDes: At the end of combat, if there remains [gold]Rekindle[/gold], raise your Max HP by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
MOKOUMOD-XU_FUS_DIMENSION_POWER.title: Xu Fu's Dimension
MOKOUMOD-TRUE_FLAME_BARRIER_POWER.smartD: Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to the attacker.
MOKOUMOD-TRUE_FLAME_BARRIER_POWER.title: True Flame Barrier
MOKOUMOD-SPONTANEOUS_COMBUSTION_POWER.sm: Whenever you gain [gold]Burn[/gold], apply that much [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies. At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_FEATHERS_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:[gold]Feather[/gold]|[gold]Feathers[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIXS_FEATHERS_POWER.title: Phoenix's Feathers
MOKOUMOD-TAUNT_POWER.smartDescription: If you see this, plz report bug.
MOKOUMOD-TAUNT_POWER.title: Taunt
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA_POWER.smartDescription: If you see this, plz report bug.
MOKOUMOD-OFUDA_POWER.title: Ofuda
MOKOUMOD-FIRE_PROOF_POWER.smartDescripti: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you lose HP from [gold]Burn[/gold], lose only [blue]1[/blue] HP.
MOKOUMOD-FIRE_PROOF_POWER.title: Fire Proof
MOKOUMOD-CRIMSON_WATCHGUARD_POWER.smartD: Whenever you play a Skill, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold]. If it is [gold]Enchanted[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] more.
MOKOUMOD-CRIMSON_WATCHGUARD_POWER.title: Crimson Watchguard
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_FORM_POWER.smartDescrip: You lose at most [blue]3[/blue] HP from [gold]Burn[/gold] at a time and no longer lose [gold]Burn[/gold] when revived from [gold]Rekindle[/gold]. At the end of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to yourself and ALL enemies.
MOKOUMOD-PHOENIX_FORM_POWER.title: Phoenix Form
MOKOUMOD-FIVE_COLORED_TURTLE_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [gold]Vigorous[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FIVE_COLORED_TURTLE_POWER.title: Five Colored Turtle
MOKOUMOD-TEMP_ESSENCE_POWER.smartDescrip: Each increases [gold]Rekindle[/gold] healing by [blue]5%[/blue] this combat.
MOKOUMOD-TEMP_ESSENCE_POWER.title: Temporary Essence
MOKOUMOD-TRAGIC_FATE_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of next turn, die.
MOKOUMOD-TRAGIC_FATE_POWER.title: Tragic Fate
MOKOUMOD-VALIANT_HEART_POWER.title: Valiant Heart
MOKOUMOD-RECKLESS_SACRIFICES_REFLECTION_: This turn, whenever you take unblocked damage, deal {Amount:plural:|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] times }that much damage back to the attacker.
MOKOUMOD-HEATWAVE_POWER.title: Heatwave
MOKOUMOD-AGONYS_EMBRACE_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you lose HP on your own turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
MOKOUMOD-AGONYS_EMBRACE_POWER.title: Agony‘s Embrace
MOKOUMOD-FEAR_NO_DEATH_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you lose HP on your own turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-FEAR_NO_DEATH_POWER.title: Fear No Death
MOKOUMOD-FAN_THE_FLAMES_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever a [gold]Fuel[/gold] is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to a random enemy.
MOKOUMOD-FAN_THE_FLAMES_POWER.title: Fan the Flames
MOKOUMOD-ETERNAL_FLAME_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:[gold]Cinder[/gold]|[gold]Cinders[/gold]} with [blue]1[/blue] less Durability into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

MOKOUMOD-INVERTED_INFERNO_POWER.selectio: Choose {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to put back in your Hand.
MOKOUMOD-INVERTED_INFERNO_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} and put that many from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-INVERTED_INFERNO_POWER.title: Inverted Inferno

MOKOUMOD-HELLFIRE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose X HP.

MOKOUMOD-HELLFIRE_POWER.title: Hellfire
MOKOUMOD-MARK_OF_SIN_POWER.description: If dies this turn, procure a [gold]Hourai Elixir[/gold].

MOKOUMOD-SHARPENED_POWER.smartDescriptio: [gold]Desperate Claw[/gold] cards hit [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more {Amount:plural:time|times} this combat.

MOKOUMOD-BUILD_UP_POWER.smartDescription: Your next {Amount:plural:Attack|[blue]{}[/blue] Attacks} this turn {Amount:plural:deals|deal} double damage.
